entries.title: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani appointed Lina Khan, the antimonopoly former FTC head, to chair the city’s Economic Development Corporation
R. James Woolsey, CIA director in Clinton administration, had the misfortune of becoming director of the CIA when the Cold War had recently been declared over
Two Democratic lawmakers want to curb tax breaks for multimillion-dollar 401(k)s and IRAs, signaling a tax priority if Democrats take control of Congress. Here’s what the bill would do.
New Jersey’s noncitizen voting reveal is a nightmare for Democrats. Read more in today’s WSJ Politics Newsletter:
Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth estimated the latest cost of the Iran war at $37.5 billion, some $9 billion higher than earlier figures provided by the Pentagon
New Jersey has removed thousands of non-U.S. citizens from the state’s voter rolls after it learned last week that a serious software error led to the registration of the individuals
Large utilities and data-center developers are joining President Trump’s promise to pay more for the electricity needed to run AI models
The Trump administration is freezing more than $1 billion in Medicaid funding to California and Minnesota
The Trump administration plans to accelerate its overhaul of federal research by supporting more individual scientists and the use of artificial intelligence rather than universities

Pete Hegseth estimates the Iran war will cost $37.5 billion, disruptions in the Red and Black seas could impact oil supplies, and Lydia Corbett’s ponytail made her Picasso’s muse. Read more in today’s What’s News newsletter:
The Trump administration sought phone records tied to relatives of New York Times reporters in its effort to identify the journalists’ sources
Republican Sen. Darline Graham, the sister of the late Lindsey Graham, said she planned to run for a full Senate term to replace her brother in South Carolina

President Trump delivered an extraordinary prime time speech alleging that the U.S. election system had been compromised, ramping up his efforts raise skepticism about the midterms
An American manufacturer will for the first time begin producing drone boats designed and battle-tested by Ukraine
